- **Reviewer**: Grant Manager + Fiscal Officer + Grantor (if threshold exceeded)
- **Actions**: Prepare budget modification request, justify changes, obtain grantor approval if required
- **Timeout**: 15 business days for internal review → per grantor timeline for external approval

### Single Audit Finding Response
- **Trigger**: Finding in A-133/Single Audit related to grant program
- **Reviewer**: CFO + Grant Compliance Officer + Program Director
- **Actions**: Develop corrective action plan, implement remediation, report to cognizant agency
- **Timeout**: Corrective action plan within 6 months of audit report issuance

name: Guest Experience Management
summary: Hotel guest lifecycle from reservation through post-stay with personalized service and real-time service recovery.
description:
A hospitality guest experience management process orchestrating the end-to-end guest journey across 100-500 room properties. The process covers reservation management, pre-arrival personalization, check-in experience, in-stay service delivery, real-time service recovery (complaint handling), loyalty recognition, and post-stay feedback management.

**Key performance metrics:**
- Guest satisfaction (GSS): >4.5/5.0
- Online review score: >4.3/5.0 (TripAdvisor, Google)
- Service recovery success rate: >85% (guest retained)
- Repeat guest rate: >40%
- Revenue per available room (RevPAR): above comp set median
business_constraints:
### Regulatory Requirements
- **ADA/accessibility** compliance for guest accommodations and services
- **Health department** food safety and pool/spa regulations
- **PCI DSS** for payment card handling
- **State/local** hotel licensing and occupancy tax compliance
- **GDPR/CCPA** for guest data privacy and marketing consent

### Business Rules
- **VIP/loyalty elite** guests receive priority recognition at check-in
- **Service recovery budget**: up to **$100** per incident at front desk level, **$500** at Duty Manager
- **Guest preferences** (room type, pillow, minibar) stored and applied on return visits
- **Post-stay survey** sent within **24 hours** of checkout

### SLA & Performance
- Check-in: **<5 minutes** wait time
- Room service delivery: **<30 minutes**
- Maintenance request response: **<15 minutes**
- Guest complaint acknowledgment: **<5 minutes** (in-person), **<2 hours** (digital)
human_approvals:
### Service Recovery Escalation
- **Trigger**: Guest complaint severity >3 (scale 1-5) OR social media mention OR VIP/loyalty elite guest issue
- **Reviewer**: Duty Manager → General Manager (severity 4-5)
- **Actions**: Immediate acknowledgment, service recovery offer, document incident, follow-up within 24h
- **Timeout**: 15 minutes for in-stay issues → 24 hours for post-stay complaints

### Rate Override/Comp Authorization
- **Trigger**: Room comp, upgrade beyond standard, or rate adjustment >20% below BAR
- **Reviewer**: Revenue Manager (rate) or GM (comp)
- **Actions**: Verify justification, approve within guidelines, track cost against recovery budget
- **Timeout**: 30 minutes for in-stay guest situations

name: Revenue Management & Pricing
summary: Dynamic room pricing, inventory controls, distribution channel management, and demand forecasting.
description:
A hospitality revenue management process optimizing pricing and inventory across 100-1,000 room types, rate plans, and distribution channels. The process covers demand forecasting, dynamic pricing optimization, length-of-stay controls, overbooking management, channel rate parity, and group/corporate rate negotiations.

**Key performance metrics:**
- RevPAR index vs. comp set: >100 (fair share)
- Occupancy: >75% annual average
- ADR growth: >3% year-over-year
- Forecast accuracy: within ±5% at 7-day window
- Channel cost of acquisition: <15% of revenue
business_constraints:
### Business Rules
- **Rate parity** maintained across all public channels (OTA, brand.com, GDS)
- **Minimum length of stay** restrictions applied for high-demand periods
- **Last room availability (LRA)** honored for corporate negotiated rates
- **Dynamic pricing** updates minimum **3x daily** based on pickup and pace
- **Overbooking** capped at **3-5%** of inventory based on historical no-show rate

### SLA & Performance
- Rate updates published to channels within **2 hours** of decision
- 90-day forecast updated **weekly**
- Group proposals within **24 hours** of inquiry
- Month-end revenue report within **3 business days**
human_approvals:
### Overbooking Walk Authorization
- **Trigger**: Confirmed reservations exceed available rooms (overbooking strategy)
- **Reviewer**: Revenue Manager + Front Office Manager
- **Actions**: Identify walk candidates (loyalty status, rate, length of stay), arrange alternate hotel, authorize compensation
- **Timeout**: Decision by 2 PM on day of arrival

### Group Rate Exception
- **Trigger**: Group request below minimum acceptable rate (MAR) for dates
- **Reviewer**: Revenue Manager + Director of Sales
- **Actions**: Analyze displacement, total revenue contribution (rooms + F&B + meeting space), approve/counter
- **Timeout**: 48 hours for group lead response

name: Event & Banquet Management
summary: Event inquiry handling, proposal generation, BEO creation, execution coordination, and post-event billing.
description:
A hospitality event management process handling 50-300 events per month across meeting rooms, ballrooms, outdoor venues, and off-site catering. The process covers inquiry response, site inspection, proposal/contract, menu planning, Banquet Event Order (BEO) creation, setup coordination, day-of execution, and post-event billing with P&L analysis.

**Key performance metrics:**
- Inquiry-to-booking conversion: >30%
- Average event revenue: >$15,000
- Event satisfaction score: >4.5/5.0
- Food cost percentage: <30%
- Setup accuracy: >98%
business_constraints:
### Regulatory Requirements
- **Health department** food safety and handling regulations (HACCP principles)
- **Fire code** occupancy limits for event spaces
- **Alcohol service** licensing and responsible service laws
- **ADA** event accessibility requirements

### Business Rules
- **BEO finalized** minimum **7 days** before event — changes after incur surcharge
- **Guaranteed guest count** due **72 hours** before event — billing based on guarantee or actual (whichever higher)
